'''Pallaxides''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was owned by [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]], who used it as a resort world.

==Description==
Pallaxides was a private [[Planet/Legends|planet]] owned by [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] where [[Starship/Legends|starships]] were not supposed to come without an express invitation. Used as a resort world, TaggeCo took its privacy seriously, even to the extent of ignoring distress calls. The planet was constantly guarded by three [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] which escorted all incoming civilian ships.<ref name="No Disintegration" />

Pallaxides was approximately 12 [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] away from [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]] with [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.<ref name="No Disintegration" />

==History==
After the [[Bombing of Syndaar Military Prep School|bombing]] of [[Syndaar Military Prep School]] by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]], [[System Sub-Commander]] [[Jared Brojtal]] went to Pallaxides with the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Marduk]]'' to seek revenge for the death of his son. He found Hoogra-D'en's [[Ort Hoogra-D'En's base|base]], which was defended by [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[spore bomb]]s, and [[Attack on Ort Hoogra-D'En's base|attacked]] it with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/rc starfighter]]s. During the attack, Hoogra-D'En planned to use the [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]] ''[[Batattis]]'' to escape, using two fleeing [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighters]] as decoys.<ref name="No Disintegration" />

Pallaxides was later freed by a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after a long [[Battle of Pallaxides|campaign]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="CE3.4" />

==Fauna==
Pallaxides had a number of large predators but none were considered a threat to travelers. However, several dangerous off-world animals, such as [[shredder bat]]s and [[zuxu]], were imported for the sporting interests of TaggeCo executives. Their introduction was made without regard to the possible long-term ecological effects.<ref name="No Disintegration" />

The largest animal native to the planet was the docile [[rormaroo]], which was used as a beast of burden.<ref name="No Disintegration" />
